# Traffikora — AI Marketing Automation for Small Businesses
# https://www.traffikora.com
# Last Updated: Day 73

## What is Traffikora?
Traffikora is an automated marketing platform for small and mid-size businesses. Set it once and it markets forever. Traffikora optimizes for Google AND every major AI engine including Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini, Copilot, and Perplexity.
